codeReview.summary: The implementation fully covers all requirements for the 'display-json-everywhere' feature. The worker added structured JSON error responses (VAL-JSON-006) with a proper ErrorCode enum and error_code() method on WerkError. Comprehensive integration tests were added covering all 7 JSON assertions from the validation contract, plus schema consistency (VAL-CROSS-005). All 18 JSON tests pass. The code follows established patterns and conventions.

summary: Feature 'display-json-everywhere' is complete and passes review. The implementation adds ErrorCode enum (error.rs), structured JSON error output (main.rs, output.rs), and 18 comprehensive integration tests (json.rs) covering VAL-JSON-001 through VAL-JSON-007 plus VAL-CROSS-005. All tests pass, code is clean, no issues found.
